results.title: A Touch of zen
results.creator_credit: King Hu, Hsia Liang-fang and Optimum Releasing
results.brief_description: Made long before “Crouching Tiger Hidden Dragon” this wonderful martial arts epic will linger with you both for its atmospheric and mystical images and its lyrical and mysterious storyline. Set during the time of the Ming Dynasty in a rural village outside Peking, the story begins with the artist Ku Shen-chai who lives with his mother in a supposedly haunted, run-down fort. The arrival of a stranger, Ou-Yang Yin, to the village stirs the curiosity within Ku only to be further flamed by the sudden appearance of a beautiful woman named Yang Hui-Ching. Plot and sub-plot are interwoven to form an intricate tale binding the three protagonists in a web of intrigue and mystery. This is not a full-on action-packed martial arts film but the scenes of combat are impressively creative and beautifully performed. Cast includes Hsu Feng, Tien Peng, Hsueh Han, Shih Chun, Pai Ying. Photography by Hua Hui-ying.

results.title: A Touch of hands (TEFC)
results.creator_credit: James T. Crawford and University of Pittsburgh
results.brief_description: Documentary on expressive arts therapist, Ed Lilley’s work with a group of emotionally handicapped children as they prepare a puppet show. The children are shown playing group games, preparing the puppets and set, rehearsing and finally performing their show. The aim of this therapy is to allow the children to extend themselves and improve their self images

results.title: A Time together
results.brief_description: An adolescent boy wants his father to teach him canoeing with his newly-bought canoe, but he is too busy. When he reluctantly agrees and takes the canoe out with his son, they sense a deeper, more meaningful relationship during their time together.

results.title: A Time out of war
results.creator_credit: Denis Sanders, Film Associates and University of California, Los Angeles
results.brief_description: A dramatic episode from the American Civil War when two Union soldiers and one Confederate soldier, facing each other at a battle front, agree on an hour’s truce. Based on “Picketts” by Robert W. Chambers.

results.title: A Time for caring (TEFC)
results.brief_description: Sexual abuse often starts between the ages of 5 and 10 and may continue into the teenage years. This program stresses that teachers and classified staff at schools should be aware of what to look for and what to do in cases of suspected sexual abuse. Narrated by Sandra Baker.

results.title: A Thousand million a year
results.brief_description: The work of the Customs and Excise Department and the many and varied investigations and duties carried out by this department at ports and aerodromes throughout the British Isles, as well as the work of Resident Excise Offices at breweries, distilleries, oil refineries, and petrol storage tanks. One third of the annual revenue of Great Britain, one thousand million pounds, comes from Customs and Excise duties.

results.title: A Taste of cherry = Ta'm e guilass
results.brief_description: Abbas Kiarostami’s `Taste of Cherry’, the 1997 Palme d’or winner at the Cannes Film Festival, follows his usual style of fiction bordering on documentary. A weary middle-aged man drives his car around looking for someone to bury him after he kills himself. He meets different people - Afghans, Kurds, a soldier, a cleric, a museum employee - all of whom try to dissuade him from his intent. This film presents a minimalist meditation on life and death, deliberately avoiding emotions or judgements. The ending is cut short due to a state prohibition on the depiction of suicide.

results.title: A Talent for Tony
results.creator_credit: Bruce Baker, Karl Holtsnider and Teleketics
results.brief_description: Parable, play and fantasy all combine to create for the younger child an experience in growth and faith. The father of five year old Tony is preparing for his art exhibition and sets his children to draw. Tony is unable to produce anything and retreats in fear, but with encouragement from his father the situation is resolved.
